allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('users:', json.dumps\(d.get\('users', []\), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\); print\('summaries keys:', list\(d.get\('summaries', [{}]\)[0].keys\(\)\) if d.get\('summaries'\) else 'no summaries'\); print\('records sample:', json.dumps\(d.get\('records', [{}]\)[:2], ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\) if d.get\('records'\) else 'no records'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); today_recs=[r for r in d.get\('records',[]\) if r.get\('date'\)=='2026-05-29']; print\('today records:', json.dumps\(today_recs, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\); print\('all summaries:', json.dumps\(d.get\('summaries',[]\), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)")
